name: Snohomish Valley Golf Center
about: Snohomish Valley Golf Center is a multi-faceted golf and entertainment venue offering a driving range with Toptracer technology, an 18-hole championship mini-golf course, a full-service restaurant (Valley Grill), and a pro shop with PGA instruction. The facility is a family-owned and operated establishment founded in 2001, providing amenities for both casual recreation and serious golf practice. It caters to a wide audience with group lessons, fitting events, and party rental options, creating a hub for both individual skill development and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: All stalls are equipped with Toptracer Range technology included with a bucket of balls
PGA Professional Patrick Ackerman offers comprehensive lessons and club fitting services
The venue features both a driving range for practice and a championship 18-hole mini-golf course for entertainment

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service restaurant (Valley Grill) with a new homestyle menu from scratch. Open for takeout and eat-at-your-stall service, including a breakfast menu.
No alcohol mentioned on the premises. BYOB keywords not found.

simulator_hardware.notes: Available for rental, described as the #1 Launch Monitor on the PGA Tour.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs. The venue does have a pro shop for club rentals and purchases, and PGA fitting services are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue has its own restaurant, Valley Grill, with a full menu available for takeout or to eat at your stall.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes of mini-golf?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time to complete the 18-hole mini-golf course.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, it is very kid-friendly. The venue features a dedicated 18-hole mini-golf course, offers junior golf programs and clinics, and has a family-oriented atmosphere.
